title: Available Package
description: A package available for contextual matching on a given impression opportunity. Lightweight projection of a media buy package with the fields needed for real-time evaluation.

media_buy_id.description: Media buy that this package belongs to

format_ids.description: Creative format identifier strings eligible for this package. Uses the format ID string (e.g., 'display_300x250', 'video_30s') rather than the full format-id object to keep the real-time payload minimal.

catalogs.description: The buyer's catalogs attached to this package, with selectors (ids, gtins, tags, category, query) scoping which items are in play. References synced catalogs by catalog_id. The provider resolves items from its cached copy.
